name: 5'x7' Handtufted Textural Floral Area Rug Sage Green - Threshold™
description:
Add comfort to your indoor space with this elegantly stylish Handtufted Textural Floral Area Rug from Threshold™. The rectangular hand-tufted area rug showcases a sage green floral pattern on a textural backdrop for a charming look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a wool construction for soft underfoot comfort, the medium-pile area rug is ideal for use in a variety of areas within your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
